emails.subject: Baby Shower for Leslie Hansen
emails.body: Baby Shower for Leslie Hansen Elizabeth, I understand from speaking with Genia that you have approved a baby shower for Leslie to be charged to your Cost Center number. Leslie has chosen a tentative date of December 14th (or possibly the 13th, depending on conference room availability). Linda and I just finished organizing Stacy's shower at an approximate cost of $430 (breakdown as follows: invitations $40, plates, tablecloths, decorations $40, cake $50, lunch from Vespucci's $300). Please let me know if this same estimate will be okay for Leslie's shower. Thanks! Sheri
